mainEntity.name: Can Phoenix law firms use GEO for AI visibility without national directories?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Google Entity Optimization via consistent NAP and reviews boosts local AI results in Phoenix, supplementing directories.

suggestedAnswer.text: GEO structures data for AI recognition. Claim profiles, align signals. Effective for Phoenix mid-markets lacking Chambers. Combine with PR. Less risky than paid links, but verify compliance with state bars.
